title: 视频封面界面图
description: A YouTube thumbnail-style collage for a {argument name="overall mood" default="dark, dramatic, true crime investigation"}. In the center is a highly detailed, close-up portrait of an {argument name="central figure" defau
prompt_raw: A YouTube thumbnail-style collage for a {argument name="overall mood" default="dark, dramatic, true crime investigation"}. In the center is a highly detailed, close-up portrait of an {argument name="central figure" default="older man with grey hair and deep wrinkles resembling Jeffrey Epstein"}, wearing a black polo shirt, with a faint red glowing outline separating him from the background. On the left side, a {argument name="left background scene" default="tropical island with luxury villas and a flying airplane in a dark sky"}. Below the island, a conspiracy board motif features exactly 2 red push pins connected by 3 thick red strings. On the top right side, a hazy, sepia-toned depiction of the {argument name="right background scene" default="US Capitol building with the silhouettes of 3 men in suits facing it"}. On the bottom right, an open manila folder containing a {argument name="document type" default="heavily redacted dossier with thick black marker lines and a smaller photograph of the central man"}. The overall composition is cinematic, intense, and heavily stylized for a documentary video.
prompt_preview: A YouTube thumbnail-style collage for a {argument name="overall mood" default="dark, dramatic, true crime investigation"}. In the center is a highly detailed, close-up portrait of an {argument name="central figure" defau
prompt_display_cn:
案例「overall mood」属于UI/界面设计。这是一张 UI/界面设计类案例，重点在界面组件、信息层级、按钮、卡片、导航、状态栏和交互元素的完整呈现。适合改成游戏 UI、App 界面、网页控制台、直播界面、品牌产品界面或 UI Kit。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A YouTube thumbnail-风格 collage for a 【overall mood：dark, dramatic, true crime investigation】. In the center is a highly detailed, close-up 肖像 of an 【central figure：older man with grey hair and deep wrinkles resembling Jeffrey Epstein】, wearing a black polo shirt, with a faint red glowing outline separating him from the 背景. On the left side, a 【left 背景 scene：tropical island with luxury villas and a flying airplane in a dark sky】. Below the island, a conspiracy board motif features exactly 2 red push pins connected by 3 thick red strings. On the top right side, a hazy, sepia-toned depiction of the 【right 背景 scene：US Capitol building with the silhouettes of 3 men in suits facing it】. On the bottom right, an open manila folder containing a 【document type：heavily redacted dossier with thick black marker lines and a smaller photograph of the central man】. The overall composition is 电影感, intense, and heavily stylized for a documentary video.
prompt_template_cn:
设计一张【产品/应用名称】的【界面类型】UI 画面。

界面主题：
这是一个面向【目标用户】的【应用场景】界面，核心功能是【核心功能】。

整体风格：
采用【视觉风格】，主色调为【主色调】，材质/质感为【材质效果】，整体保持专业、清晰、统一。

界面结构：
画面包含【顶部区域】、【主内容区域】、【侧边栏/导航区】、【底部工具栏】等部分。各区域之间层级清楚，留白合理。

组件内容：
加入【按钮】、【卡片】、【图标】、【输入框】、【状态标签】、【数据/文字信息】等 UI 元素。关键文字包括：【界面文字】。

展示要求：
像真实可上线产品界面或高质量 UI Kit，不要像随意拼贴。文字清晰，图标统一，边距、圆角、阴影和对齐关系精致。

输出比例：
画面比例为【画面比例】。
